scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @kraftbase/api" "npm run dev -w @kraftbase/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @kraftbase/shared && npm run build -w @kraftbase/api && npm run build -w @kraftbase/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @kraftbase/shared && npm run typecheck -w @kraftbase/api && npm run typecheck -w @kraftbase/web
